message:
fix(web): RAII connection guard prevents panic-leaked slots; negotiate improvements

debug.rs: Debug server connection handler now uses an ActiveConnectionGuard
RAII wrapper that decrements active_connections in its Drop impl. The
handler body is wrapped in catch_unwind so a panicking snapshot function
cannot leak an active connection slot, which would permanently reduce
the server's effective max_connections capacity. Test added:
panicking_snapshot_request_does_not_leak_connection_slots verifies that
a second request succeeds after a panic in the first.

negotiate.rs: content negotiation improvements from earlier audit work
(specificity-aware matching, exact q=0 rejection).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
